mapper.insert: INSERT INTO award_task (order_id, user_id, award_id, award_type, status, retry_count) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{awardId}, #{awardType}, #{status}, #{retryCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE award_task SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE award_task SET retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
